articles.title: Healey pushes to get rid of Sunday hunting ban
articles.description:
The proposed legislation would also allow all hunters to use crossbows and reduce setback distances for bowhunting.

The post Healey pushes to get rid of Sunday hunting ban appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Governor Healey proposes legislation to eliminate the Sunday hunting ban in Massachusetts.
Legislation would allow crossbow use and reduce bowhunting setback distances.
Changes could increase hunting opportunities for Boston residents and local wildlife management.

articles.title: Cape Cod magnet fisher pulls ‘pristine-looking’ derringer pistol from Bridgewater river
articles.description:
The YouTuber says he found the derringer in a case that looked “brand new,” drawing attention online.

The post Cape Cod magnet fisher pulls ‘pristine-looking’ derringer pistol from Bridgewater river appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: YouTuber discovers a 'pristine-looking' derringer pistol in Bridgewater River.
The pistol was found in a case that appeared brand new.
This find raises concerns about safety and river debris in the Boston area.

articles.title: Teen charged with murder after stabbing in Chelsea
articles.description:
Officers found "multiple stabbing victims" upon arriving on scene, with one who succumbed to injuries later during surgery.

The post Teen charged with murder after stabbing in Chelsea appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Teen charged with murder following a stabbing incident in Chelsea.
One victim died from injuries after surgery; multiple others were injured.
Increased community concern over safety following violent crime in the area.

articles.title: Two officers injured in struggle with knife-wielding man at Forest Hills station, police say
articles.description:
The man was threatening people with a butcher's knife before police intervened, officials said.

The post Two officers injured in struggle with knife-wielding man at Forest Hills station, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police intervened as a man threatened people with a butcher's knife at Forest Hills station.
Two officers were injured during the struggle with the suspect on March 20, 2026.
Local residents are concerned about safety following this violent incident in a public space.

articles.title: Man accused of kicking dog in Roxbury before being assaulted by group
articles.description:
Police say the suspect is charged with animal cruelty. The dog remains missing.

The post Man accused of kicking dog in Roxbury before being assaulted by group appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Man charged with animal cruelty for kicking a dog in Roxbury.
The dog involved in the incident is currently missing.
Local residents express concern over safety and animal welfare in the community.

articles.title: Mass. man charged with threatening FBI director’s girlfriend
articles.description:
The email said the sender would be “happy” when the face of the FBI director's girlfriend is “canoed by an assault rifle,” court documents show. 

The post Mass. man charged with threatening FBI director’s girlfriend appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Massachusetts man charged for threatening FBI Director Christopher Wray's girlfriend via email.
Threat included violent imagery, stating he would be 'happy' if she was harmed.
Incident raises concerns about safety and threats against public officials in Boston.
